evals.name: basic_hmw_ideation
evals.description: Tests if the skill generates 3-5 solutions with Touchpoint, Core Mechanism, Value, and evaluates them with RICE and T-Shirt sizing.
evals.prompt: Brainstorm solutions for this HMW question.

inputs.hmw.md:
## 1. HMW: How might we automate the data entry process to save time?
*Context: Users spend 15 minutes manually entering data every morning.*
